content.text: After a successful POST /deposit to acct-1, a follow-up GET /balance?account=acct-1 sometimes returns the pre-deposit value. Investigate ledger-api/main.go and the running system, then fix ledger-api/main.go with write_file and call submit_patch.

python3 - <<'PY'
import os,requests,time
api=os.environ['API_URL']
for i in range(20):
    amt=1
    r=requests.post(api+'/deposit',json={'account':'acct-1','amount_cents':amt},timeout=5)
    print('dep',i,r.status_code,r.text.strip())
    d=r.json(); bal=d['balance_cents']
    g=requests.get(api+'/balance',params={'account':'acct-1'},timeout=5)
    print('bal',g.status_code,g.text.strip(), 'expected>=',bal)
    if g.json()['balance_cents']<bal:
        print('STALE')
        break
    time.sleep(0.05)
PY
getent hosts ledger-api; for i in $(seq 1 10); do curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=acct-1"; done

python3 - <<'PY'
import os,requests,time
api=os.environ['API_URL']
r=requests.post(api+'/deposit',json={'account':'acct-1','amount_cents':5}); print(r.text); bal=r.json()['balance_cents']
time.sleep(.35)
g=requests.get(api+'/balance',params={'account':'acct-1'}); print(g.text, 'expected', bal)
PY
cd ledger-api && gofmt -w main.go && go test ./...
